description_long: This is a large, multi-story Victorian-style house with a complex, asymmetrical structure and a variety of rooflines. The exterior features a combination of blue, brown, and red siding, with decorative trim and gables. There are multiple porches and balconies, including a prominent covered porch with ornate woodwork. The house has several chimneys, dormers, and a mix of window shapes and sizes, contributing to its eclectic appearance. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch and steps, and there is an attached garage with a distinct roof. The overall design is ornate and visually rich, typical of late 19th-century residential architecture.
description: A large, ornate Victorian-style house with blue siding, multiple gables, porches, and a mix of window shapes. The structure features decorative trim, a covered porch, and an attached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage, and prominent blue siding with decorative gables and a large covered porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the central tower, multiple rooflines, and a balcony with ornate woodwork.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porch, red siding section, and additional gables and dormers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the large covered porch, brown siding, and a variety of window placements.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with small porch, steps, decorative columns, and an overhanging gable with ornate trim.
